articles.title: Building a VideoAgent-Style Multi-Agent System: Intent Parsing, Graph Planning, and Tool Routing for Video Editing Tasks
articles.excerpt: In this tutorial, we reconstruct the VideoAgent workflow as a runnable, API-key-free multi-agent pipeline.  We build an intent parser, an agent library, a tool router, a graph planner, and a textual-gradient optimizer...

articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: Stanford Researchers Introduce TRACE: A Capability-Targeted Agentic Training System That Turns Recurrent Agent Failures Into Synthetic RL Environment
articles.excerpt: Agentic LLMs keep failing the same way because they lack specific, reusable capabilities.  Stanford's TRACE diagnoses those gaps from an agent's own trajectories, synthesizes one verifiable training environment per ca...

articles.title: Prime Intellect Releases Verifiers v1: Composable Tasksets, Harnesses, and Runtimes for Agentic RL Training and Evaluations
articles.excerpt: Prime Intellect launched verifiers 0. 0, previewing a rewritten "v1" core under the verifiers

articles.title: Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.
